---
title: "Guarded Nested SMO/SVM Pilot"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Goal

Run the leakage-aware nested SMO/SVM pipeline.

# Required behavior

- Outer test folds are untouched until final evaluation.
- Feature selection occurs inside inner training folds only.
- Class weighting or SMOTE occurs inside training folds only.
- Hyperparameters are selected inside the inner loop.
